sys_ui_page.html:
IncentIQ Data Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how IncentIQ handles customer data within ServiceNow.

Application Name: IncentIQ

Publisher: CtrlAltNow

Application Type: Sales Incentive Management Application

Effective Date: June 2026

Version: V1.0

Welcome – Your Privacy Matters to Us

At CtrlAltNow, we value the trust customers place in us when they download and install IncentIQ from the ServiceNow Store. This Privacy Policy explains what information the application may collect, why it is used, and how it is protected.

IncentIQ is designed to operate within the customer's ServiceNow instance. By default, the application does not transmit, process, or store customer data outside of ServiceNow.

What Information We Collect

IncentIQ may collect, process, and store information configured or provided by the customer within their ServiceNow instance, including:

  • User and organizational data – user profiles, user identifiers, sales users, managers, reporting hierarchy, business units, and related organizational details.
  • Incentive management data – compensation plans, plan assignments, quotas, quota assignments, earning rules, lookup rules, payout rules, fiscal years, and fiscal periods.
  • Transaction and performance data – sales transactions, revenue values, credit calculations, achievement values, quota attainment, commission, and payout calculations.
  • Configuration data – application settings, data model configurations, import configurations, rule configurations, workflow settings, and administrative preferences.
  • System and audit data – timestamps, created/updated information, audit logs, processing status, and application execution logs.

The application only processes data required to deliver Sales Incentive Management functionality.

Why We Collect This Information

IncentIQ uses customer data to:

  • Manage sales compensation plans and assignments.
  • Manage quotas and quota assignments.
  • Process sales transactions and performance data.
  • Calculate credits, commissions, payouts, and incentive statements.
  • Generate dashboards, reports, and analytics.
  • Support application administration, troubleshooting, and auditing.
IncentIQ does not use customer data for advertising, resale, profiling, or marketing purposes.

Sharing Information: When and Why

IncentIQ does not sell, rent, or share customer data with CtrlAltNow or any third party. Customer data remains under the customer's control within their ServiceNow instance.

Data may be shared or transferred only when the customer explicitly configures integrations with external systems through their ServiceNow environment.

Where and How Your Data Is Stored

  • Storage Location: Application data is stored within the customer's ServiceNow instance.
  • No External Transmission: By default, IncentIQ does not transmit customer data outside ServiceNow.
  • Customer-Controlled Integrations: If integrations are configured, data transfer is initiated and controlled by the customer.
  • Data Retention: Data is retained according to the customer's ServiceNow data retention, archival, and deletion policies.

Security Practices

IncentIQ relies on ServiceNow platform security capabilities and customer-configured controls, including:

  • Role-based access controls
  • Access Control Lists
  • Authentication and authorization provided by ServiceNow
  • Audit logging and activity tracking
  • Domain Separation, where enabled by the customer
  • Encryption capabilities provided by the ServiceNow platform

Customers are responsible for configuring appropriate roles, permissions, access controls, and security policies in their ServiceNow environment.

Third-Party Services

IncentIQ does not include embedded third-party services that collect, process, transmit, or store customer data outside ServiceNow as part of its standard functionality.

If future versions introduce optional third-party integrations, those integrations will be documented and controlled by the customer.

Your Rights – You’re in Control

Customers remain responsible for managing data within their ServiceNow instance. Depending on the customer's internal policies and applicable regulations, users may contact their ServiceNow administrator to:

  • Request access to data stored in the application.
  • Request correction of inaccurate data.
  • Request deletion or archival of data, where applicable.
  • Raise privacy or security concerns.

Need Help or Have Questions?

For questions regarding this Privacy Policy or IncentIQ's data handling practices, please contact:

CtrlAltNow

Email: Contact@CtrlAltNow.com

Website: www.ctrlaltnow.com

Where to Find This Policy

This privacy policy is available within the IncentIQ application under the module App Privacy Policy.

Keeping You Informed

CtrlAltNow may update this policy periodically to reflect changes in application functionality, regulatory requirements, or privacy practices. Updated versions will be made available through the application or accompanying documentation.

ServiceNow Certification Compliance

Data Location Data remains within the customer's ServiceNow instance by default.
External Transfer No customer data is transferred outside ServiceNow by default.
Data Sharing Customer data is not sold, rented, or shared with third parties.
Security Data is protected using ServiceNow platform security controls.

This policy is included to support customers with transparent information about IncentIQ's data handling practices.
sys_ui_page.name: incentiq_privacy_policy
